parameters.query: SELECT nl.id, nl.order_id, nl.trigger, o.tracking_code, o.recipient_name, o.recipient_phone, o.status, o.destination_address, o.estimated_delivery_date FROM notifications_log nl JOIN orders o ON o.id = nl.order_id WHERE nl.status = 'pending' AND nl.type = 'whatsapp' AND o.recipient_phone IS NOT NULL LIMIT 10
UPDATE notifications_log SET status = 'sent', sent_at = NOW(), recipient = '{{ $json.phone }}' WHERE id = '{{ $json.notification_id }}'
